    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    G

    GameChoice - Class in NonGui.GameLogic
    A utility class responsible for displaying beautiful, styled JavaFX dialogs that allow players to make in-game choices (e.g., selecting cards, players, or objectives).
    GameChoice() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameLogic.GameChoice
     
    GameEngine - Class in NonGui.GameLogic
    The core engine of the game.
    GameEngine() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameLogic.GameEngine
     
    GameplayUtils - Class in NonGui.GameUtils
    Utility class providing logic for specific gameplay actions such as sacrificing heroes, rotating board objectives, and basic dice challenges.
    GameplayUtils() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameUtils.GameplayUtils
     
    GameSetup - Class in NonGui.GameLogic
    Handles the initial setup of the game state.
    GameSetup() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameLogic.GameSetup
     
    GameUI - Class in gui
    The main entry point for the "Rise of Runeterra" graphical user interface.
    GameUI() - Constructor for class gui.GameUI
     
    Garen - Class in NonGui.ListOfLeader
    Represents "Garen" Leader Card.
    Garen() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfLeader.Garen
    Constructs a new Garen Leader Card with Tank class and modifier enhancement ability.
    generateRandomCard() - Static method in class NonGui.GameUtils.GenerationsUtils
    Generates a random card from a predefined subset for testing purposes.
    generateRandomLeader() - Static method in class NonGui.GameUtils.GenerationsUtils
    Generates a placeholder Leader card.
    GenerationsUtils - Class in NonGui.GameUtils
    Utility class responsible for generating or drawing specific entities.
    GenerationsUtils() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameUtils.GenerationsUtils
     
    get(String) - Static method in class gui.card.ImageCache
    Retrieves an image from the cache or loads it if it doesn't exist.

    Gets the ability description of the card.

    Retrieves the player whose turn it currently is.

    Retrieves the index of the current active player.

    Gets the value of the currentRoll property.

    Gets the entire discard pile list.

    Gets the flavor text (lore) of the card.

    Gets the flavor text (lore) of the leader.
